title: ABE Ammo Configuration
description: Ammunition/projectile configuration for the Advanced Ballistics Extension

ammoClass.description: ARMA 3 CfgAmmo class name this config applies to

cdmId.description: Drag model curve ID (g1, g7, g8, or custom curve name)

bcSupersonicFactor.description: BC scale factor in supersonic regime (Mach ≥ 1.2). Reference BC is typically measured at supersonic speeds (Mach 1.5-2.5), so this is usually 1.0.

bcSubsonicFactor.description: BC scale factor in subsonic regime (Mach ≤ 0.8). G7 boat-tail projectiles typically recover to ~1.15× reference BC subsonically. G1 flat-base: ~1.05×.

muzzleVelocityMs.description: Muzzle velocity in m/s (from reference barrel length)

referenceBarrelLengthMm.description: Barrel length used for muzzleVelocityMs measurement

fragThresholdMs.description: Minimum velocity for fragmentation in m/s (-1 = no fragmentation)

fragCount.description: Expected number of fragments on fragmentation

notes.description: Free-text notes about data source or assumptions
